name: PropertyCommands
summary: Tapir Add-On 'Property Commands' command group — 9 JSON-RPC commands.

methods.name: GetAllProperties
methods.summary: Returns all user defined and built-in properties.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: properties.

methods.name: GetPropertyValuesOfElements
methods.summary: Returns the property values of the elements for the given property. It works for subelements of hierarchal elements also.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyValuesForElements.

methods.name: SetPropertyValuesOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the property values of elements. It works for subelements of hierarchal elements also.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: GetPropertyValuesOfAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the property values of the attributes for the given property.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyValuesForAttributes.

methods.name: SetPropertyValuesOfAttributes
methods.summary: Sets the property values of attributes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: CreatePropertyGroups
methods.summary: Creates Property Groups based on the given parameters.

params.name: propertyGroups
params.doc: The parameters of the new property groups.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyGroupIds.

methods.name: DeletePropertyGroups
methods.summary: Deletes the given Custom Property Groups.

params.name: propertyGroupIds
params.doc: The identifiers of property groups to delete.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: CreatePropertyDefinitions
methods.summary: Creates Custom Property Definitions based on the given parameters.

params.name: propertyDefinitions
params.doc: The parameters of the new properties.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyIds.

methods.name: DeletePropertyDefinitions
methods.summary: Deletes the given Custom Property Definitions.

params.name: propertyIds
params.doc: The identifiers of properties to delete.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.
